glosses.ro: a se apropia; a se apropia de

translations.en: We are getting closer to the station.
translations.es: Nos estamos acercando a la estación.
translations.fr: On se rapproche de la gare.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们离车站越来越近了。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đến gần nhà ga.
translations.nl: We komen dichter bij het station.
translations.hi: हम स्टेशन के करीब पहुँच रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 駅にだんだん近づいている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; reflexive usage typically taking a dative complement indicating the entity being approached.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; co-referential with the subject.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; marks the noun 'Bahnhof' as the dative complement.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; complement of 'nähern' indicating the entity being approached.

sentences.target: Die Wanderer nähern sich dem Gipfel.

translations.de: Die Wanderer nähern sich dem Gipfel.
translations.en: The hikers are approaching the summit.
translations.es: Los senderistas se acercan a la cima.
translations.fr: Les randonneurs se rapprochent du sommet.
translations.it: Gli escursionisti si avvicinano alla vetta.
translations.pt: Os montanhistas estão se aproximando do cume.
translations.vi: Những người leo núi đang đến gần đỉnh.
translations.hi: पर्वतारोही शिखर के करीब पहुँच रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 登山者たちは頂上に近づいている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determines 'Wanderer' as the subject.
Common noun, plural, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; used reflexively and selecting a dative complement.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person (plural here), accusative; co-refers to 'Die Wanderer'.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; marks the noun 'Gipfel' as the dative complement.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; complement of 'nähern' indicating the goal approached.

sentences.target: Ich will mich der Katze nicht nähern.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl mɪç deːɐ̯ ˈkat͡sə nɪçt ˈnɛːʁən/

translations.de: Ich will mich der Katze nicht nähern.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl mɪç deːɐ̯ ˈkat͡sə nɪçt ˈnɛːʁən/
translations.en: I don't want to approach the cat.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas m'approcher du chat.
translations.ko: 나는 그 고양이에게 다가가고 싶지 않아.
translations.ru: Я не хочу подходить к коту.
translations.pt: Eu não quero me aproximar do gato.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn lại gần con mèo.
translations.nl: Ik wil niet dicht bij de kat komen.
translations.uk: Я не хочу наближатися до кота.
translations.hu: Nem akarok a macskához közel menni.
translations.hi: मैं उस बिल्ली के पास नहीं जाना चाहता.
translations.el: Δεν θέλω να πλησιάσω τη γάτα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke nærme meg katten.
translations.id: Aku tidak mau mendekati kucing itu.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte gå nära katten.
translations.ro: Nu vreau să mă apropii de pisică.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke gå tæt på katten.
translations.ja: 私はその猫に近づきたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive ('nähern').
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person singular, accusative; co-referential with the subject.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; marks 'Katze' as the dative complement.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; complement of 'nähern' indicating the entity being approached.
Negation particle; scopes over the VP, negating the action.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will', used reflexively with a dative complement.

sentences.target: Du darfst dich der Kante nicht nähern.
sentences.reading: /duː daʁfst dɪç deːɐ̯ ˈkantə nɪçt ˈnɛːʁən/

translations.de: Du darfst dich der Kante nicht nähern.
translations.ipa: /duː daʁfst dɪç deːɐ̯ ˈkantə nɪçt ˈnɛːʁən/
translations.en: You must not go near the edge.
translations.fr: Tu ne dois pas t'approcher du bord.
translations.pt: Você não deve chegar perto da borda.
translations.vi: Bạn không được lại gần mép vực.
translations.ar: لا يجوز لك الاقتراب من الحافة.
translations.nl: Je mag niet dicht bij de rand komen.
translations.uk: Тобі не можна наближатися до краю.
translations.hi: तुम्हें किनारे के पास जाना मना है.
translations.pl: Nie wolno ci podchodzić do krawędzi.
translations.el: Δεν επιτρέπεται να πλησιάζεις στην άκρη.
translations.nb: Du må ikke nærme deg kanten.
translations.id: Kamu tidak boleh mendekat ke tepi.
translations.sv: Du får inte gå nära kanten.
translations.ro: Nu ai voie să te apropii de margine.
translations.da: Du må ikke gå tæt på kanten.
translations.ja: 端に近づいてはいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses permission/possibility and selects a bare infinitive.

Negation particle; negates the predicate headed by the infinitive.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'darfst', used reflexively with a dative complement.
